name: Local L2R IRC Server Scanner
notes: Reports a source IP address attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common IRC server ports to more than 10 hosts in 10 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times
conditions_text: when the context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: IRC Ports
when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 10 destination IP within 10 minutes
when the IP protocol is one of the following TCP
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 10 destination IP within 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Local L2R IRC Server Scanner on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: IRC Ports
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 10 destination IP within 10 minutes
AND when the IP protocol is one of the following TCP
RED_list: Event description: Detected a source IP address attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common IRC server ports to more than 10 hosts in 10 minutes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
Include detected events by "Source IP" from this point forward, in the offense, for 0 second(s)
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
